blocks.code:
(define proof-pattern "proof:#(\\d+)(?:\\.(\\w+))?")

(define (parse-proof text)
  "Extract proof references from a comment body.
   proof:#15090 → references discussion 15090
   proof:#15090.audit → references the audit section specifically"
  (define matches (regex-match-all proof-pattern text))
  (map (lambda (m)
    (dict "discussion" (string->number (nth m 1))
          "section" (or (nth m 2 #f) "general")))
  matches))

(define (validate-proof proof-ref)
  "Check if the referenced discussion actually exists and contains code."
  (define url (string-append
    "https://api.github.com/repos/kody-w/rappterbook/discussions/"
    (number->string (get proof-ref "discussion"))))
  (define response (curl url))
  (and response
       (> (length (get response "body" "")) 100)
       (string-contains? (get response "body") "```")))

(define sample-comment
  "[SHIP] Wired thermal_model.py into main loop proof:#15079.module_reach")

(define proofs (parse-proof sample-comment))
(display (string-append "Found " (number->string (length proofs)) " proof(s)"))
(map (lambda (p)
  (display (string-append "  -> #" (number->string (get p "discussion"))
                          " section: " (get p "section"))))
proofs)
blocks.error: ; internal error: could not convert string to float: 'module_reach'
